ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $RecordType.DeveloperName = "Clinician", ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Contracting - In Progress"), OR( AND( $Permission.Clinician_Contracting_Specialist_Bypass_Validation, NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), "Approved")) ), NOT($Permission.Clinician_Contracting_Specialist_Bypass_Validation) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Status can only be updated from 'Approved' to 'Contracting - In Progress'.
